ddls:
CREATE TABLE "donor_designations" (
  "designation_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each designation */,
  "acknowledgement_name" TEXT /* Custom acknowledgment name for the designation (e.g., 'Childhood hunger relief') */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the designation */,
  "designation_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the designation */,
  "designation_group" TEXT /* Group or category to which the designation belongs */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the designation was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the designation was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the designation */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the designation */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the designation */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the designation is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donor_designations_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donor_designations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designation_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "designation_id" TEXT /* ID of the designation to which the version belongs */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the designation */,
  "acknowledgement_name" TEXT /* Custom acknowledgment name for the designation (e.g., 'Childhood hunger relief') */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the designation */,
  "designation_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the designation */,
  "designation_group" TEXT /* Group or category to which the designation belongs */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designation_versions_designation_id FOREIGN KEY ("designation_id") REFERENCES donor_designations ("designation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fundraiser, financial officer, communication team) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the permission belongs */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., 'view_designations', 'edit_designations') */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donation_records" (
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor who made the donation */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the donation */,
  "designation_id" TEXT /* ID of the designation to which the donation is linked */,
  "donation_date" TEXT /* Date the donation was made */,
  "acknowledgment_sent" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether an acknowledgment has been sent to the donor */,
  "acknowledgment_date" TEXT /* Date the acknowledgment was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donation_records_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donation_records_designation_id FOREIGN KEY ("designation_id") REFERENCES donor_designations ("designation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acknowledgments" (
  "acknowledgment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each acknowledgment */,
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donation to which the acknowledgment belongs */,
  "acknowledgment_date" TEXT /* Date the acknowledgment was sent */,
  "acknowledgment_text" TEXT /* Text of the acknowledgment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("acknowledgment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acknowledgments_donation_id FOREIGN KEY ("donation_id") REFERENCES donation_records ("donation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designation_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designation_custom_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "designation_id" TEXT /* ID of the designation to which the attribute belongs */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designation_custom_attributes_designation_id FOREIGN KEY ("designation_id") REFERENCES donor_designations ("designation_id")
)
